basic_details.job_title: AIIMS Delhi Scientist-B/ Project Research Scientist – I (Non-medical) Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
basic_details.organization_name: All India Institute of Medical Sciences, New Delhi
basic_details.short_information: All India Institute of Medical Sciences, New Delhi (AIIMS Delhi) has officially released a notification for the recruitment of Scientist-B/ Project Research Scientist – I (Non-medical) Posts. This recruitment drive offers a great opportunity for candidates looking for research jobs. Interested and eligible candidates can apply online through the official website.

application_fee.details: No application fee is mentioned in the official notification.

qualification.education_qualification: BE or BTech/ IT/ CS (Four Years Course) OR First Class Post-graduate Degree OR Second Class Post-graduate Degree with PhD.
qualification.details: First Class BE or BTech/ IT/ CS Four Years Course First Class Post-graduate Degree, including the integrated PG Degrees Second Class Post-graduate Degree, including the integrated PG Degrees with PhD Hands-on experience in analysis of different bio-potentials using Python; Performing advanced statistical analysis, such as- cluster analysis, multivariate linear regression modeling etc. on electrophysiological, metabolomics and behavioral data; Development of distinct AI models utilizing EEG, HRV, and metabolomics data; Good Interpersonal skills and ability to work in a team.

selection_process: Please refer to the official notification for selection process details.
how_to_apply: Candidates who meet the eligibility criteria can apply online for the AIIMS Delhi Scientist-B/ Project Research Scientist – I (Non-medical) Recruitment 2026.
Applications must be submitted online on or before 20-07-2026.
To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section.
Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of AIIMS Delhi to complete the application.
Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details.
Upload required documents such as photograph, signature, and certificates in the prescribed format.
Pay the application fee online, if applicable.
Review all details carefully before submitting the form.
Take a printout or save a copy of the submitted application for future reference.

content_sections.heading: AIIMS Delhi Scientist-B/ Project Research Scientist – I (Non-medical) Vacancy 2026 Notification PDF
content_sections.text: Candidates who are interested in applying for the AIIMS Delhi Recruitment 2026 should first download and carefully read the official notification PDF. The notification contains complete details about vacancy distribution, eligibility criteria, age limit, stipend/salary, selection process, important dates, and application instructions. Reading the official document is important to ensure that you meet all requirements before submitting the application form. Download AIIMS Delhi Scientist-B/ Project Research Scientist – I (Non-medical) Job 2026 Notification PDF

content_sections.heading: How to Apply
content_sections.text: Candidates who meet the eligibility criteria can apply online for the AIIMS Delhi Scientist-B/ Project Research Scientist – I (Non-medical) Recruitment 2026. Applications must be submitted online on or before 20-07-2026. To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section. Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of AIIMS Delhi to complete the application. Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details. Upload required documents such as photograph, signature, and certificates in the prescribed format. Pay the application fee online, if applicable. Review all details carefully before submitting the form. Take a printout or save a copy of the submitted application for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the AIIMS Delhi Scientist-B/ Project Research Scientist – I (Non-medical) recruitment?
faq.answer: The last date to submit the application for the AIIMS Delhi Scientist-B/ Project Research Scientist – I (Non-medical) posts is 20-07-2026. Ensure your application is submitted well before this deadline.

faq.question: Q2. What are the educational qualifications required for this post?
faq.answer: Candidates must possess a BE or BTech in IT/CS (Four Years Course) OR a First Class Post-graduate Degree OR a Second Class Post-graduate Degree with PhD to be eligible for this position.

faq.question: Q3. What is the age limit for the Scientist-B/ Project Research Scientist – I (Non-medical) post?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for the Scientist-B/ Project Research Scientist – I (Non-medical) post is 35 years. Age relaxation details, if any, are usually provided in the official notification.

faq.question: Q4. What is the salary offered for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The selected candidates will receive a consolidated salary of ₹ 71,120/- per month, which includes House Rent Allowance (HRA).

faq.question: Q5. How can I apply for the AIIMS Delhi Scientist-B/ Project Research Scientist – I (Non-medical) position?
faq.answer: Applications are to be submitted online. A direct link for application is usually provided in the 'Important Links' section of the job notification or on the official AIIMS Delhi website.

faq.question: Q6. Is there any application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The official notification does not mention any application fee for this recruitment drive. Candidates are advised to check the official notification for any updates regarding fees.

faq.question: Q7. What type of job is this recruitment for?
faq.answer: This is a project-based recruitment, meaning the positions are associated with a specific research project funded by ICMR at AIIMS Delhi.

faq.question: Q8. What is the advertisement number for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The advertisement number for this recruitment is 1-1708/EM/Dev/SG/208/4279/2023/001.

faq.question: Q9. What is the location of the job?
faq.answer: The job is based in New Delhi, at the All India Institute of Medical Sciences, New Delhi.

faq.question: Q10. What kind of experience is preferred for this role?
faq.answer: Hands-on experience in Python-based bio-potential analysis, advanced statistical analysis (cluster analysis, multivariate linear regression), development of AI models using EEG, HRV, and metabolomics data, and good interpersonal skills are preferred.

faq.question: What is the last date to apply for the AIIMS Delhi Scientist-B/ Project Research Scientist – I (Non-medical) recruitment?
faq.answer: The last date to submit the application for the AIIMS Delhi Scientist-B/ Project Research Scientist – I (Non-medical) posts is 20-07-2026. Ensure your application is submitted well before this deadline.
